title: eriocephalus microphyllus var. pubescens
intro: Eriocephalus microphyllus var. pubescens, also known as the Round-leaf or Small-leaf White-eyes plant, is a shrub-like plant native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The plant's leaves and stems are used in traditional medicine, where they exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making them useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eriocephalus microphyllus var. pubescens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and combat infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which is then consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
